title: Neurobiology
description: Investigating neural circuits, synaptic plasticity, and sensory integration in model organisms.

title: Computational Biology
description: Developing models to analyze genetic sequences, structure prediction, and biological pathways.

title: Scientific Computing
description: Using high-performance programming languages to simulate cellular systems and physical dynamics.

title: Data Analysis
description: Applying statistical learning and modeling techniques to parse high-throughput experimental data.

title: Earth System Science
description: Understanding biogeochemical feedback loops and ecological shifts in response to climate change.

title: Endurance Running
description: Training for marathons, exploring trail networks, and studying the physiology of high-aerobic exercise.
